anchor_students: CAT RUNNER  عمر صبري أبو عاذره
contour_prerequisite_en: meaningful only after B4-001 · B8-002 · B8-003 contour asymmetries understood — not a unified sufficiency catalogue
why_sufficient_or_not_ar: كود Godot + لقطات متسقة → bounded_plausibility للتنفيذ — لا تكفي وحدها لادعاء تحقق المعيار. يجب قراءتها عبر contours: surface selection (B4) · inflation (B8-002) · closure (B8-003) قبل generalizing cluster.
modulation_ar: غياب video/testing يحدّ الثقة (L1 bounded caution) — لا يلغي الدليل. contradictions في artifact chain → L2 downward per CONTRADICTION_MODULATION_v1
would_not_claim_ar: criterion achieved · verified · operationally observed · typical cluster = automatic Pass
core_insight_en: typical Godot cluster exemplifies bounded ecology band — not contour-free sufficiency template
ai_grade_context: M/U cluster 57-81% — calibration target not automation target

case_label: M 81% vs D 80% — pedagogical sufficiency contour ambiguity (not runtime superiority)
why_sufficient_or_not_ar: الفرق ليس one clearly stronger implementation — بل difference in pedagogical confidence contours أكثر من difference in raw runtime evidence presence. محمد: كثافة تنفيذ عالية قد تخلق felt implementation completeness قبل التحقق pedagogically. ريان: evidence surface أوضح · runtime narrative أسهل نفسياً · replay persuasion أسرع.
typical_band_note_en: Not grade boundary ambiguity — institutional interpretation threshold difference (sufficiency felt · coherence sensed · confidence shaped pedagogically)
modulation_ar: 81% M vs 80% D ≈ institutional interpretation threshold — لا runtime superiority difference
would_not_claim_ar: larger runtime footprint does not automatically imply stronger criterion authority · clearer pedagogical presentation can disproportionately stabilize institutional confidence · almost achieved · grade equivalence · one clearly stronger implementation
core_insight_en: confidence stabilization is partly shaped by evidence legibility not only evidence volume
core_insight_ar: استقرار الثقة يتشكّل جزئياً من legibility الأدلة — لا من حجمها فقط
atlas_purpose_ar: exemplar لفهم how institutional confidence forms under uneven evidence presentation
ai_grade_context: M 81% (محمد رمزي) vs D 80% (ريان) — calibration target not automation target

case_label: U 5–15% — failure confidence stabilization under degraded interpretive legibility

contrast_with_b8_002.B8-002: confidence inflated by legibility · felt completeness · density vs clarity
contrast_with_b8_002.B8-003: failure stabilized by illegibility · degraded pedagogical intake · ambiguity vs institutional closure

core_question_shift_en: from what evidence exists? → what kind of absence psychologically stabilizes failure?

laith.reading: U strongly shaped by intake legibility collapse — institution encountered submission as ambiguity not authored implementation

ayham_15.graded_surface: docx with structure · code organization · intentionality · authored flow
ayham_15.reading: pedagogically more coherent than score suggests — insufficiency stabilization under low-confidence intake not obvious failure certainty

why_sufficient_or_not_ar: failure contours form differently from success contours. المؤسسات لا ترفض evidence دائماً — بل تفشل في metabolize it into pedagogically legible form → stable institutional failure confidence.
core_insight_en: institutions may stabilize failure confidence before adequately stabilizing interpretive legibility
core_insight_ar: قد تستقر ثقة الفشل المؤسسية قبل استقرار legibility التفسيرية الكافية
laith_sensitive_insight_en: large noisy implementation ecologies may collapse into institutional illegibility — evidence ecology exceeding institutional intake coherence
would_not_claim_ar: U always means no implementation existed · single low score proves pedagogical correctness · docx-only equals full archive reviewed · institutional confidence in failure implies adequate interpretive encounter · weak evidence cluster
ai_grade_context: U 5–15% — primary anchor for failure contour calibration

case_label: Retry-after-402 — corpus integrity vs identity confidence
why_sufficient_or_not_ar: corpus سليم بعد retry — identical evidence may yield different AI grades (non-determinism). اسم المجلد «واجب الألعاب…» يضعف identity confidence لا code confidence. modulation L1 على identity فقط.
modulation_ar: folder names weaken identity confidence not code confidence · grade drift across retry = epistemic non-determinism warning — not corpus corruption
would_not_claim_ar: student identity verified from folder name · retry grade drift proves incorrect pedagogy · same hash = same legitimate confidence
core_insight_en: separate identity confidence from evidence confidence — corpus integrity ≠ grading stability
ai_grade_context: post-retry grades 11-71% U — batch 8 vs batch 9 drift documented
